allow: Bash(pdftotext "CV-Oscar Fabián Ruíz de Chávez Muñoz 2026.pdf" -)

PowerShell($files = @\("certificate-p37734kzf97b-1775255203.pdf", "certificate-qrs65h5b2jhp-1775255696.pdf", "certificate-to4dpyrzkk7q-1775255871.pdf"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $path = "C:\\Users\\oscar.ruiz\\Downloads\\portafolio\\public\\assets\\Certificados Anthropic\\$f"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $matches = [regex]::Matches\($text, '[A-Za-z][A-Za-z ]{10,60}'\); Write-Host "=== $f ==="; $matches | Select-Object -First 30 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value.Trim\(\) } | Where-Object { $_ -match '[A-Za-z]{3,}' } | Select-Object -Unique })
